title: Service Lifecycle Management
description: Registering, initializing, and retrieving services via the ServiceManager IoC container

actors.name: Caller / Boot System
actors.note: External code (e.g. Kernel, Module) that registers services and retrieves them

actors.name: Service Instance
actors.note: A concrete class extending Service (e.g. LaunchOnInitService, BaseService) that implements _construct/_init lifecycle hooks

use_cases.name: Register Service
use_cases.description: Caller calls register(name, factory, options). Factory.create() instantiates the service with parameters and context. Entry is added to services_l_ and services_m_ with status=Registering.
key_steps: Entry pushed to services_l_[] and services_m_[name]

use_cases.name: Resolve Dependencies & Initialize Service
use_cases.description: maybe_init_ checks if all declared DEPENDS are Running. If yes, calls init_service_. If not, marks service as Pending and registers it in waiting_[dependency] map.
use_cases.triggers: Automatically after register(); also re-triggered when a dependency transitions to Running
key_steps: entry.instance.as(TService).get_depends() → reads static DEPENDS + instance get_depends()
get_waiting_for_(depends) → filters deps not yet Running
If all deps ready → init_service_(name): status=Initializing → service_impl.init() → _init() → status=Running
If deps missing → status=Pending; name stored in waiting_[dependency]
After a service goes Running, cascade: for each waiting dependent, call maybe_init_ again

use_cases.name: Retrieve Running Service (Sync)
use_cases.description: Synchronous lookup. Returns instance only if status=Running; returns undefined if Pending/Initializing; throws if not registered.

use_cases.name: Async-Retrieve Service (Wait for Init)
use_cases.description: Awaits until the named service is Running, then returns it. Internally delegates to wait_for_init([name]).
key_steps: wait_for_init installs a listener in init_listeners_[] if service not yet Running
Listener is checked after every init_service_ completion
Once Running, listener removes itself and resolves the promise

use_cases.name: Wait for Multiple Services
use_cases.description: Blocks until all listed services are Running.
key_steps: Else adds check function to init_listeners_[]
Re-evaluated after each service's init_service_ completes

use_cases.name: Subscribe to Service Events via HOOKS
use_cases.description: ServiceFeature installs HOOKS during service init. Each hook subscribes the service instance to a named event on another service's topic bus.
key_steps: For each hook spec: get dependency service via context.services.info(spec.service)
Hooks are deferred until service init so dependency services are already Running

use_cases.name: Execute Launch Commands on Init
use_cases.description: LaunchOnInitService reads GUI launch_options.on_initialized at _init time and dispatches named commands (e.g. window-call).

use_cases.name: Query Service Info / Status
use_cases.description: Retrieve the raw service entry (name, instance, status, statusStartTS, statusWaitingFor) without triggering wait.

key_classes.name: AdvancedBase
key_classes.note: Root base class; provides trait system (.as()), property merging, and topic pub/sub

state.services_l_: Array — ordered list of service entries
state.init_listeners_: Array<fn> — callbacks fired on each service init

key_classes.name: LaunchOnInitService
key_classes.note: GUI frontend service; executes parameterized window function calls during boot init

key_classes.name: BaseService
key_classes.note: Backend base; adds logging, config access, error handling, run_as_early_as_possible()

key_relationships: ServiceManager creates Service instances via factory.create()
ServiceManager calls TService.init() on each service at initialization
Service implements TService trait (init, construct, get_depends)
ServiceFeature installs HOOKS into Service instance at init time
ServiceFeature uses TTopics trait on dependency services to subscribe events
ServiceManager tracks dependency graph in waiting_[] map
lifecycle_state_machine: Registering + deps unmet → status: Pending (stored in waiting_[dep])
Registering + deps met OR dependency goes Running → status: Initializing
init() complete → status: Running, statusStartTS set
Running → cascades: check waiting_[name] and re-attempt maybe_init_ for dependents
important_notes: register() uses setTimeout(0) delay to allow async/await caller stacks to settle before init
get(name) returns undefined (not throws) if service exists but not yet Running
aget(name) is the safe async accessor — waits for Running then returns
TService is a Symbol trait, not a class — accessed via .as(TService)
DEPENDS is a static class array; get_depends() merges static + dynamic deps
ServiceFeature HOOKS provide declarative cross-service event wiring without imperative coupling
LaunchOnInitService is a GUI-layer service — uses ES module imports, not CommonJS
